sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁמגּר

Transliteration: shamgar

Phonetic: sham-gar'

BDB Definition:

Shamgar = "sword"
  1. son of Anath and a judge of Israel; with an ox-goad he slew 600 Philistines and delivered Israel

Origin: of uncertain derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
